title: Sustainable Aviation Fuel Quarterly Trend Sheet - Q2 2025
content:
Global SAF Production to Surge Past 150 Million Gallons in 2025Q2

Global SAF production to reach 151.6 million gallons in 2025Q2 as per cCarbon Estimates, marking a 76% increase from 2024Q4 levels. North Americaâ€™s SAF Supply to Double with Entry of Multiple States; California Still Leads.
author: Sanyam Malik
